title: My Money Is Organised
subtitle: An affirmation for consolidating pride in financial order
excerpt: A short affirmation for anchoring the reality of organised finances as a current fact, not a future goal. The statement names capability and pride in present tense — where things are now, not where they are heading.
sourceNotes: Adapted from Day 55 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program to Attract Cash, Overflow & Abundance Without Hustle or Burnout (Rebecca J Page, 2025, ISBN 9798268793796).

practice.whenToUse: Use when you want to consolidate the feeling of financial order, or to start the day from a position of calm capability with money.

content.text: A short affirmation for consolidating the reality of organised finances in the body. The statement places capability and pride in present tense — what is true now.
My money is organised. I know where everything lives. I am proud, capable, and clear in every area of my finances.

Say it out loud three times, hand on the centre of your chest. Let the body register it as fact before the mind checks it. If a specific area of your finances comes to mind as you say it, let that be a signal of where to direct attention today — not as a problem, but as the next area to bring the same order.
Adapted from Day 55 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
